title: Tharrand
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Tharrand''' was a weapons dealer who sold some heavy [[Blaster pistol/Legends|blaster pistols]] to the [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] gunrunner [[Tru'eb Cholakk]] in exchange for [[Tibanna/Legends|Tibanna]] gas.

==Appearances==
*''[[Imperial Double-Cross]]'' {{1stm}}
